evidence.detail: FireRedASR2S README states fireredasr2 is a self-contained standalone module and documents separate ASR examples.
fireredasr2s/fireredasr2/asr.py exposes FireRedAsr2.from_pretrained(runtime_type, model_path, config) and transcribe(uttids, wav_paths).
Onboarding target is FireRedASR2-AED only; no switch to LLM or all-in-one system path is allowed without diagnose/replan evidence.

rationale.runtime_target: Standalone FireRedAsr2 AED path is the narrowest repo-native callable target matching the requested phase-1 runtime target.
rationale.scope_boundary: FireRedAsr2System is intentionally excluded because phase-1 target explicitly forbids broadening unless standalone path is proven invalid by evidence.
